mapper.sql:
/* wms-inbound-iborderreport-sql-oracle.xml - selectIbOrdersql - 입고현황 - 주문별 현황 - 입고 주문 조회 SQL */ WITH /* ============================================================ * 1) 반품 원본 * ============================================================ */ IB_BASE AS ( SELECT A.CTKEY , A.OWKEY , TO_DATE(SUBSTR(B.IBEXPCTDATE, 1, 8), 'YYYYMMDD') AS BASE_DATE , A.ICKEY , COALESCE(A.CNFRMQTY, 0) AS CNFRMQTY , COALESCE(A.DMGQTY, 0) AS DMGQTY , COALESCE(A.DFCQTY, 0) AS DFCQTY , COALESCE(A.DONAQTY, 0) AS DONAQTY , COALESCE(A.FOODDMGQTY, 0) AS FOODDMGQTY , COALESCE(A.CPAMT, 0) AS CPAMT FROM TWORK_INFO_IB_DT A JOIN TWORK_INFO_IB_HD B ON A.CTKEY = B.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = B.OWKEY AND A.IBHDKEY = B.IBHDKEY WHERE A.CTKEY = '09' AND A.OWKEY = 'DAISO' AND B.IBHDTYPECD = '50' ),
/* ============================================================ * 2) 물류내 재고 원본 * ============================================================ */ STOCK_BASE AS ( SELECT IVLC.CTKEY , IVLC.OWKEY , TO_DATE(SUBSTR((IVLC.UPDATEDATE)::TEXT,1,8),'YYYYMMDD') AS STOCKDATE , IVLC.ICKEY , COALESCE(IVLC.TOTQTY, 0) AS TOTQTY , COALESCE(IC.SLPRC, 0) AS SLPRC , ZN.ZNKEY FROM TWORK_INFO_IVATXLC IVLC JOIN TWORK_MST_LC LC ON LC.CTKEY = IVLC.CTKEY AND LC.LCKEY = IVLC.LCKEY JOIN TWORK_MST_ZN ZN ON ZN.CTKEY = LC.CTKEY AND ZN.ZNKEY = LC.ZNKEY JOIN TWORK_MST_IC IC ON IC.CTKEY = IVLC.CTKEY AND IC.OWKEY = IVLC.OWKEY AND IC.ICKEY = IVLC.ICKEY WHERE IVLC.CTKEY = '09' AND IVLC.OWKEY = 'DAISO' ),
/* ============================================================ * 3) 반품 집계 * ============================================================ */ IB_RET AS ( SELECT CTKEY , OWKEY , BASE_DATE , COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN CNFRMQTY > 0 THEN ICKEY END) AS rtn_all_sku , SUM(CNFRMQTY) AS rtn_all_ea , SUM(CNFRMQTY * CPAMT) AS rtn_all_amt
, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN DMGQTY > 0 THEN ICKEY END) AS rtn_dmg_sku , SUM(DMGQTY) AS rtn_dmg_ea , SUM(DMGQTY * CPAMT) AS rtn_dmg_amt
, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN DFCQTY > 0 THEN ICKEY END) AS rtn_bad_sku , SUM(DFCQTY) AS rtn_bad_ea , SUM(DFCQTY * CPAMT) AS rtn_bad_amt
, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN DONAQTY > 0 THEN ICKEY END) AS rtn_don_sku , SUM(DONAQTY) AS rtn_don_ea , SUM(DONAQTY * CPAMT) AS rtn_don_amt
, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN FOODDMGQTY > 0 THEN ICKEY END) AS rtn_food_sku , SUM(FOODDMGQTY) AS rtn_food_ea , SUM(FOODDMGQTY * CPAMT) AS rtn_food_amt FROM IB_BASE GROUP BY CTKEY, OWKEY, BASE_DATE ),
/* ============================================================ * 4) 물류내 재고 집계 * ============================================================ */ STOCK_RET AS ( SELECT CTKEY , OWKEY , STOCKDATE
, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ZNKEY IN ('DMS','DFS','DNS') AND TOTQTY > 0 THEN ICKEY END) AS wh_all_sku , SUM(CASE WHEN ZNKEY IN ('DMS','DFS','DNS') THEN TOTQTY ELSE 0 END) AS wh_all_ea , SUM(CASE WHEN ZNKEY IN ('DMS','DFS','DNS') THEN TOTQTY * SLPRC ELSE 0 END) AS wh_all_amt
, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ZNKEY='DMS' AND TOTQTY>0 THEN ICKEY END) AS wh_dmg_sku , SUM(CASE WHEN ZNKEY='DMS' THEN TOTQTY ELSE 0 END) AS wh_dmg_ea , SUM(CASE WHEN ZNKEY='DMS' THEN TOTQTY * SLPRC ELSE 0 END) AS wh_dmg_amt
, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ZNKEY='DFS' AND TOTQTY>0 THEN ICKEY END) AS wh_bad_sku , SUM(CASE WHEN ZNKEY='DFS' THEN TOTQTY ELSE 0 END) AS wh_bad_ea , SUM(CASE WHEN ZNKEY='DFS' THEN TOTQTY * SLPRC ELSE 0 END) AS wh_bad_amt
, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ZNKEY='DNS' AND TOTQTY>0 THEN ICKEY END) AS wh_don_sku , SUM(CASE WHEN ZNKEY='DNS' THEN TOTQTY ELSE 0 END) AS wh_don_ea , SUM(CASE WHEN ZNKEY='DNS' THEN TOTQTY * SLPRC ELSE 0 END) AS wh_don_amt
, 0 AS wh_food_sku , 0 AS wh_food_ea , 0 AS wh_food_amt FROM STOCK_BASE GROUP BY CTKEY, OWKEY, STOCKDATE ),
/* ============================================================ * 5) 전체 SKU (중복 제거) * ============================================================ */ ALL_SKU AS ( SELECT CTKEY , OWKEY , 기준일자 , COUNT(DISTINCT ICKEY) AS all_sku FROM ( SELECT CTKEY, OWKEY, BASE_DATE AS 기준일자, ICKEY FROM IB_BASE WHERE CNFRMQTY > 0 UNION SELECT CTKEY, OWKEY, STOCKDATE AS 기준일자, ICKEY FROM STOCK_BASE WHERE ZNKEY IN ('DMS','DFS','DNS') AND TOTQTY > 0 ) GROUP BY CTKEY, OWKEY, 기준일자 )
/* ============================================================ * 6) 최종 SELECT (넥사크로 바인드 대응) * ============================================================ */ SELECT TO_CHAR(COALESCE(I.BASE_DATE, S.STOCKDATE),'YYYY') AS year, TO_CHAR(COALESCE(I.BASE_DATE, S.STOCKDATE),'MM') AS month, TO_CHAR(COALESCE(I.BASE_DATE, S.STOCKDATE),'DD') AS day,
COALESCE(A.all_sku, 0) AS all_sku, COALESCE(I.rtn_all_ea, 0) + COALESCE(S.wh_all_ea, 0) AS all_ea, COALESCE(I.rtn_all_amt, 0) + COALESCE(S.wh_all_amt, 0) AS all_amt,
COALESCE(I.rtn_all_sku, 0) AS rtn_all_sku, COALESCE(I.rtn_all_ea, 0) AS rtn_all_ea, COALESCE(I.rtn_all_amt, 0) AS rtn_all_amt,
COALESCE(S.wh_all_sku, 0) AS wh_all_sku, COALESCE(S.wh_all_ea, 0) AS wh_all_ea, COALESCE(S.wh_all_amt, 0) AS wh_all_amt,
COALESCE(I.rtn_dmg_sku, 0) AS rtn_dmg_sku, COALESCE(I.rtn_dmg_ea, 0) AS rtn_dmg_ea, COALESCE(I.rtn_dmg_amt, 0) AS rtn_dmg_amt,
COALESCE(I.rtn_bad_sku, 0) AS rtn_bad_sku, COALESCE(I.rtn_bad_ea, 0) AS rtn_bad_ea, COALESCE(I.rtn_bad_amt, 0) AS rtn_bad_amt,
COALESCE(I.rtn_don_sku, 0) AS rtn_don_sku, COALESCE(I.rtn_don_ea, 0) AS rtn_don_ea, COALESCE(I.rtn_don_amt, 0) AS rtn_don_amt,
COALESCE(I.rtn_food_sku, 0) AS rtn_food_sku, COALESCE(I.rtn_food_ea, 0) AS rtn_food_ea, COALESCE(I.rtn_food_amt, 0) AS rtn_food_amt,
COALESCE(S.wh_dmg_sku, 0) AS wh_dmg_sku, COALESCE(S.wh_dmg_ea, 0) AS wh_dmg_ea, COALESCE(S.wh_dmg_amt, 0) AS wh_dmg_amt,
COALESCE(S.wh_bad_sku, 0) AS wh_bad_sku, COALESCE(S.wh_bad_ea, 0) AS wh_bad_ea, COALESCE(S.wh_bad_amt, 0) AS wh_bad_amt,
COALESCE(S.wh_don_sku, 0) AS wh_don_sku, COALESCE(S.wh_don_ea, 0) AS wh_don_ea, COALESCE(S.wh_don_amt, 0) AS wh_don_amt,
COALESCE(S.wh_food_sku, 0) AS wh_food_sku, COALESCE(S.wh_food_ea, 0) AS wh_food_ea, COALESCE(S.wh_food_amt, 0) AS wh_food_amt,
0 AS exp_sku, 0 AS exp_ea, 0 AS exp_amt
FROM IB_RET I FULL OUTER JOIN STOCK_RET S ON I.CTKEY = S.CTKEY AND I.OWKEY = S.OWKEY AND I.BASE_DATE = S.STOCKDATE LEFT JOIN ALL_SKU A ON A.CTKEY = COALESCE(I.CTKEY, S.CTKEY) AND A.OWKEY = COALESCE(I.OWKEY, S.OWKEY) AND A.기준일자 = COALESCE(I.BASE_DATE, S.STOCKDATE) ORDER BY year, month, day;
